programme.title: Forbidden Science - Digital Desire
programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man

The highlight of the week came when she got to experience her very first double-up with her dad, Slade. Sharing a moment like that in the turkey woods is something they'll never forget, making this a truly unforgettable hunt.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc:
In this episode, we dive into how we are using our knowledge and experience to not only get some amazing hunting property, but to have other people pay for it. Sound too good to be true?
We also take you on some great hunts we’ve had on our journey flipping land and think back on some memories from the past and what the future is going to look like.
We hope you can learn a thing or two in this episode and encourage you to reach out with any questions you may have about this process.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man

It is an amazing week at camp with five arrows being sent down range and multiple elk hitting the dirt. You do not want to miss this one.

programme.desc: In Minnesota Clay, Cameron Mitchell stars as a gunfighter with fading eyesight, fighting to clear his name before blindness claims him. Wrongly imprisoned and hunted by both lawmen and outlaws, Clay must rely on skill, cunning, and sheer will to survive. With tense showdowns, stark desert landscapes, and the grit of early Spaghetti Western style, this is the tale of a man racing against time—and his own failing vision—for justice.
